hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r file; echo "$file" | grep -qE '(routes/index\.js|app\.routes\.ts|\.service\.ts|\.interceptor\.ts|\.guard\.ts|\.model\.ts|\.component\.ts|app\.config\.ts)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"ARCHITECTURE.md UPDATE REQUIRED: The file you just modified touches the architecture (route, service, interceptor, guard, model, or component). Before committing, review ARCHITECTURE.md and update any sections that no longer reflect the current design."}}' || true; }
